page_metadata.biotools__summary: Database of single nucleotide polymorphism (dbSNP) contains human single nucleotide variations, microsatellites, and small-scale insertions and deletions along with publication, population frequency, molecular consequence, and genomic and RefSeq mapping information for both common variations and clinical mutations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Database of single nucleotide polymorphism (dbSNP) contains human single nucleotide variations, microsatellites, and small-scale insertions and deletions along with publication, population frequency, molecular consequence, and genomic and RefSeq mapping information for both common variations and clinical mutations.
